scope: final design fixes from live-site /finance review (presentation-only)
fixes_applied: D1: /finance zero-state — formatExpenseRub() kills negative-zero (−0 ₽ -> 0 ₽); formatMarginPercent() returns '—' on zero/neg base (no meaningless +0%/маржа 0%); sparkline suppressed when metric=0 (no fake trend on empty data)
D2: latinitsa fixed — ForecastWidget «Нет прогноза по invoice'ам» -> «по счетам» (grep confirmed no other UI latinisms in finance)

D3: ₽ glyph consistency — root cause IBM Plex Mono lacks U+20BD -> font fallback mismatch. Fix: added 'IBM Plex Sans' as fallback #2 in .mono-num (globals.css) + tailwind mono (tailwind.config.js). Plex Mono stays FIRST so digits remain tabular-mono; only ₽ falls to Plex Sans (same weight/colour). No new fonts/deps. PDF (DejaVu) untouched.
tests: 915/915 pass (was 905; +14 it() in new format.test.ts — real edge assertions: 0, -0, null/garbage, percent-of-zero, single-minus + non-zero regression). formatRub/formatMoneyRub byte-identical (verified git diff).
par_verdict: technical APPROVE — no format regression for non-zero, margin math byte-identical (only zero-base guard added), font-stack preserves tabular digit alignment, scope strictly presentation + 2 pure helpers
